description: RIFO is a real-estate platform focused on home buying, renting, and related services through its website and mobile apps. Its public site describes listing search, client services, and agent/vendor connectivity.
summary: RIFO exposes a public MCP server at `https://rifo-home-mcp.rifo.co/mcp`; no public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found for `rifo.co`.
